2116040.name: Gloomscape
2116040.description:
Gloomscape is a crafting, survival, exploration FPS where you're sent to explore the foggy, unknown world, and unlock its many secrets.

The world of Gloomscape offers an eerie immersive sim where small choices can change the ecosystem around you. The level of Gloom can be lowered or raised through direct intervention, or through the ecosystems interacting with each other

  • You will be able to grow and harvest crops, which you can use to feed wildlife or use them to craft items.
  • Fight creatures that will drop items you can use for crafting new equipment.
  • Help others who are trapped in Gloomscape, or bring about their demise.
  • Explore strange locations, record audio logs, and unlock the mysteries that Gloomscape has to offer.
  • Watch as the changing Gloom levels trigger new behaviors in the wildlife, enemies, and even the environment.
2116040.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
